title: The Pantheon of Joy
overview: In Ouidah, Benin, the district "The Pantheon of Joy". At 12 years old, fatherless, one's eyes widen before the villa of a Big Brother who seems to have conquered Europe. To quench one's hunger, to sing, to ask for alms. And dreaming.

trailers.title: LE PANTHEON DE LA JOIE, un film de Jean Odoutan (Benin)
trailers.channel_name: L'AFRIQUE FAIT SON CINEMA, FESTIVAL DURABLE
